name: Paddock Masters
tagline: Collaborative F1 race prediction game with scoring and standings
description: A multi-tenant prediction game platform for Formula 1 races. Users create workspaces, invite friends, and compete by predicting race outcomes through customizable questions per Grand Prix. Features automated scoring, season standings, email notifications, and a complete admin panel for managing seasons, races, and results.
highlights: Multi-tenant workspace system with invitations and role-based access
Customizable prediction questions per Grand Prix with template system
Automated scoring engine with season standings and leaderboards
OTP email authentication with NextAuth.js v5
